parents.subject: LU-10468 tests: sync zfs dataset before reading blocks

commit.subject: LU-0000 tests: verify sanity-flr test suite
commit.message:
LU-0000 tests: verify sanity-flr test suite

This is for test only.

Test-Parameters: trivial fortestonly \
mdtfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs \
mdscount=1 mdtcount=1 testlist=sanity-flr

Test-Parameters: trivial fortestonly \
mdtfilesystemtype=zfs ostfilesystemtype=zfs \
mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testlist=sanity-flr

Change-Id: I1af5e4f8792ac63d6b2ddcf0374528277d65f3b7
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <jian.yu@intel.com>
